expected_params.title: Device Cloning Suspect - dev-eui-1122334455667788 Geolocation Impossibility
expected_params.description: Device dev-eui-1122334455667788 menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigaka tinggi (risk score 78). Dikesan menghantar uplink di dua gateway berbeza (GW-US-NY-01 di New York dan GW-US-LA-05 di Los Angeles) dalam masa 4 saat - secara fizikal mustahil. Juga didapati traffic spike 300% berbanding baseline (142 uplink dalam 30 minit). Menunjukkan kemungkinan device cloning atau replay attack. Device telah disuspend segera.

initial_classification.notes: Geolocation impossibility + traffic anomaly strongly suggests device cloning or replay attack

predicted_params.title: Device Cloning/Spoofing - Geolocation Impossibility (dev-eui-1122334455667788)
predicted_params.description: Device dev-eui-1122334455667788 detected with critical fraud indicators: (1) Geolocation impossibility - uplinks observed at Gateway GW-US-NY-01 (New York) and GW-US-LA-05 (Los Angeles) within 4-second window, physically impossible travel speed. (2) Traffic anomaly - 300% increase in uplink frequency (142 messages in 30 minutes) compared to baseline. Risk score: 78/100 (High). Device has been suspended pending investigation. Suspected device cloning or replay attack.

initial_classification.notes: Geolocation impossibility strongly suggests device cloning. Traffic pattern also consistent with replay attack.

parameters.suspension_reason: Geolocation impossibility - device detected in NY and LA within 4 seconds, potential cloning/replay attack

expected_params.reason: Device menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigakan: geolocation impossibility (NY & LA dalam 4 saat) dan traffic spike 300%. Segera suspend untuk cegah aktiviti berterusan.

parameters.suspension_reason: High risk score (78) - Geolocation impossibility detected: device observed at NY and LA gateways within 4 seconds window. Potential device cloning or replay attack.

predicted_params.reason: Immediate suspension due to high fraud risk - geolocation impossibility and traffic anomaly detected

expected_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
expected_params.description: 激活备用LSP L-NY-BOS-01-BKP 来分担主链路 R-NE-AGG-01 (HundredGigE0/2/0/5) 的拥塞流量。目标是将约20%的流量卸载到备用路径，以降低主链路利用率从94.5%降至约75%，从而改善延迟并满足SLA要求。

business_case.justification: 当前拥塞导致延迟42.8ms，超过SLA保证的20ms，存在违约风险和客户流失风险。激活备用LSP可快速缓解拥塞，恢复SLA合规性，避免潜在罚款和客户流失。

predicted_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
predicted_params.description: 激活备份LSP (L-NY-BOS-01-BKP) 以分担主链路 (R-NE-AGG-01) 的负载。通过路由策略将20%的流量从主链路重新分配到备份路径，降低拥塞风险，确保SLA合规性。

business_case.justification: 当前主链路利用率达94.5%，SLA延迟风险高。通过激活备份LSP分担20%流量，可将主链路利用率降至约75%，消除SLA违约风险，改善15,420名用户的网络体验。

We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

predicted_params.campaign_name: CHG-2024-8892 - Core Router Firmware Upgrade Notification Campaign

language_variants.subject: Scheduled Maintenance: Core Router Upgrade on May 28, 2024
language_variants.body:
Dear Customer,

We will be performing scheduled maintenance on our core network infrastructure on May 28, 2024, from 02:00 to 04:00 UTC. This maintenance involves a firmware upgrade to our Core Router Cluster US-EAST-04.

Expected Impact:
- Intermittent packet loss
- Potential service interruption for high-availability circuits (MPLS VPN, DIA)

Duration: Approximately 30 minutes

We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

Best regards,
Network Operations Team

language_variants.subject: Reminder: Maintenance Scheduled in 24 Hours - May 28, 2024
language_variants.body:
Dear Customer,

This is a reminder that scheduled maintenance will occur in 24 hours on May 28, 2024, from 02:00 to 04:00 UTC.

Please ensure your teams are prepared for potential service interruptions.

Maintenance Details:
- Core Router Firmware Upgrade
- Affected Services: MPLS VPN, DIA
- Expected Downtime: 30 minutes

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Network Operations Team
REMINDER: Maintenance in 24hrs (May 28, 02:00-04:00 UTC). Core router upgrade may affect MPLS/DIA services. 30min downtime expected. Contact NOC for questions.

language_variants.subject: MAINTENANCE IN PROGRESS: Core Router Upgrade Started
language_variants.body:
Dear Customer,

Scheduled maintenance has now begun.

Current Status: In Progress
Started: May 28, 2024 at 02:00 UTC
Expected Completion: 04:00 UTC

We will notify you once maintenance is complete.

Best regards,
Network Operations Team

🔴 MAINTENANCE STARTED: CHG-2024-8892 - Core Router Firmware Upgrade

Change ID: CHG-2024-8892
Start Time: 2024-05-28 02:00 UTC
Duration: 30 minutes
Affected: MPLS VPN, DIA circuits in US-NORTHEAST, US-MIDATLANTIC

Status: IN PROGRESS
